name: Video Editor MCP server
description: Server to upload, edit, search, and generate videos using Video Jungle and LLM integration with custom vj:// URI scheme and video editing tools.

tools.name: add-video
tools.description: Add a video from a URL and returns a vj:// URI to reference the video file.

tools.name: search-videos
tools.description: Search videos using embeddings and keywords, returning video matches.

tools.name: generate-edit-from-videos
tools.description: Generate a rendered video edit from a set of video files.

tools.name: generate-edit-from-single-video
tools.description: Generate an edit from a single input video file.

resources.name: videos
resources.description: Access individual videos and projects via custom vj:// URI scheme.

env.name: LOAD_PHOTOS_DB
env.description: Enable searching local Photos app videos on MacOS
